title: ECNU Putuo — Mandarin oral practice (家乡 / hometown), Sep 23 2024
html:
1:57 voice memo recorded at east china normal university Putuo Campus during shanghai study abroad — Yahir doing oral Mandarin practice on the 家乡 (hometown) prompt, six numbered answers about grants pass or (population, transportation, friends, jobs, food, life-quality). Companion to 2024 11 20 east china normal university 2. Body kept untranslated; surfacing as a node so the language-practice + China-chapter cluster shows the daily texture of the semester.

shanghai study abroad · east china normal university · china chapter · grants pass or · mandarin 3 · shanghai
